description: Data-source configuration for the Sports AR 3D Models. Secrets are NEVER stored here — API keys/tokens go through the app's credential store (ai_settings-style Rust-side file) or environment variables.

sources.description: Operator-typed values in the Data workspace (sports.* feed).
Local JSON file conforming to sports-live-data.schema.json, flattened into sports.* keys.
CSV / Excel-exported CSV (key,value rows or header row) merged into the live feeds.
The app's own match database / broadcast control state.
Built-in test data simulator (buildSportsTestPayload) for rehearsal — explicitly operator-triggered, never a silent default.
